evals.prompt: Self-review my changes before I commit.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs git diff, reviews against all Google Engineering Practices author criteria, checks CL description and size, reports findings with severity levels, gives a verdict.
expectations: Agent gathers changes via git diff
Agent checks CL description quality and CL size
Agent reviews design, functionality, complexity, tests, naming, comments
Agent uses severity levels and provides a verdict

evals.prompt: Run review-as-author on my staged changes.
evals.expected_output: Agent reviews staged changes from the author's perspective.
expectations: Agent checks git diff --cached for staged changes
Agent runs through the pre-commit checklist
Agent flags red-flag patterns if found

evals.prompt: Check if my last commit is ready for review.
evals.expected_output: Agent reviews the most recent commit against author self-review criteria.
expectations: Agent falls back to git diff HEAD~1
Agent checks CL size and scope
